title: Number of Students Doing Homework at a Given Time
titleCn: 在既定时间做作业的学生人数

testcases.input: startTime = [1,2,3], endTime = [3,2,7], queryTime = 4 Output: 1 Explanation: We have 3 students where: The first student started doing homework at time 1 and finished at time 3 and wasn't doing anything at time 4. The second student started doing homework at time 2 and finished at time 2 and also wasn't doing anything at time 4. The third student started doing homework at time 3 and finished at time 7 and was the only student doing homework at time 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We have 3 students where: The first student started doing homework at time 1 and finished at time 3 and wasn't doing anything at time 4. The second student started doing homework at time 2 and finished at time 2 and also wasn't doing anything at time 4. The third student started doing homework at time 3 and finished at time 7 and was the only student doing homework at time 4.

testcases.input: startTime = [4], endTime = [4], queryTime = 4 Output: 1 Explanation: The only student was doing their homework at the queryTime.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only student was doing their homework at the queryTime.
